text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hand a newly-delivered fan letter to Mejiro
McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I have read the letter. Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The expectations of people are quite sobering,
aren't they?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
"The support from your fans is a guidepost to
your dreams."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Grandmother once said those words to me. I feel
as though I've gotten a little closer to
understanding their true meaning.
choice_data_list:
The person who wrote the letter would be
happy to hear that too, I'm sure.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Then, I shall have to repay this sentiment
with a good performance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I will train to the best of my abilities today and
always!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen happily puts in her best effort
throughout the entire training session.
